Hero.subtitle: We build permanent estates in the digital world.

Manifesto.subtitle: We are not here to crack codes; we are here to rewrite industry rules.
Manifesto.intro_text: Enigma Software is a next-generation tech studio built to solve chronic problems in traditional industries, digitalize sluggish workflows, and simplify complex operations with a single click. For us, every industry is an ecosystem waiting to be optimized; every business problem is a code meant to be deciphered.
Manifesto.card_1_desc: We detect time losses across sectors and transform workflows into seamless automation.
Manifesto.card_2_desc: We offer advanced tech without massive costs through flexible, budget-friendly SaaS models.
Manifesto.card_3_desc: Instead of clunky systems, we build modern architectures to create lightning-fast solutions.
Manifesto.card_4_desc: Staying one step ahead of trends, we introduce our partners to the technology of tomorrow.
Manifesto.footer_quote: We are not just a software vendor; we are the strongest technology partner on your digital transformation journey. Engineering behind the unseen, simplicity within complexity.

SplitSection.description: Every second you don't transition to digital, your customer becomes your competitor's. Or vice versa.
SplitSection.card_1_title: 01 // If you aren't on Google, you don't exist
SplitSection.card_1_desc: Whether your store is on the most luxurious street or you sell the highest quality product. If people can't find you when they search online, you're only working for your competitors at that moment. A business without a digital storefront is like a locked shop.
SplitSection.card_2_desc: You pay thousands of liras in commissions every month to food delivery apps, real estate sites, or large marketplaces. Every day you don't have your own software automation, you remain an employee of your own business and a silent partner to intermediary platforms.
SplitSection.card_3_title: 03 // The Hidden Cost of Manual Work
SplitSection.card_3_desc: Those Excel spreadsheets and notebook scribbles you say 'We've solved things this way for years' are actually losing you time and money every day. If your processes aren't automated, you are doomed to lose money due to human error.

Portfolio.title: Enigma
Portfolio.subtitle: Permanent projects we've built in the digital world

Solutions.subtitle: // Listing system solutions and active operations.
Solutions.sol_01_desc: High-performance and SEO-focused promotional sites that carry your brand's vision to the digital world with futuristic lines.
Solutions.sol_02_desc: Flexible panels where you can end-to-end control all dynamic contents, data flows, and cyber architecture on your site without coding.
Solutions.sol_03_desc: Optimized single-page web tools for your advertising campaigns or specific product launches, turning visitors directly into customers.
Solutions.sol_04_desc: Custom software that digitalizes internal complex business processes, form approval mechanisms, and manual data flows by moving them to the cloud.
Solutions.sol_05_desc: Cloud platforms that manage your company's customer relations, team tasks, projects, and operations from a single futuristic center.
Solutions.sol_06_desc: Secure cloud solutions that automate staff leave tracking, payrolls, corporate income-expense balance, and invoicing processes.
Solutions.sol_07_desc: Smart calendar platforms for clinics, hotels, or service businesses working on a subscription (SaaS) model, preventing conflicts.
Solutions.sol_08_desc: Dark-mode compatible interactive graphic panels (Dashboard) that process raw data produced by your business and strengthen decision mechanisms.
Solutions.sol_09_desc: High-performance mobile applications offering courier tracking, fast appointments, or field service control right in your customers' pockets.
Solutions.sol_10_desc: Closed-circuit mobile ecosystems focused on instant messaging, content sharing, and community interaction for your brand or niche sector.
Solutions.sol_11_desc: iOS and Android shopping tools focused on one-click checkout and high cart conversion, fully integrated with your existing online store.
Solutions.sol_12_desc: Industrial mobile solutions providing barcode scanning and stock entry for field personnel, warehouse workers, or logistics teams.
Solutions.sol_13_desc: Massive online store systems coded from scratch entirely specific to your brand's volume and speed, instead of ready-made bulky infrastructures.
Solutions.sol_14_desc: Closed-circuit commercial portals with custom pricing, risk limits, and forward payment for your company's sub-dealers and wholesalers.
Solutions.sol_15_desc: Integrators that sync order, stock, invoice, and price movements across giant channels like Amazon, Trendyol from a single cyber panel.
Solutions.sol_16_desc: Connecting global and local payment networks to your site at the highest level of cyber security standards (PCI-DSS).
Solutions.sol_17_desc: Assistants trained with your company's product list, support docs, and corporate memory, greeting customers 24/7 with human naturalness.
Solutions.sol_18_desc: AI engines that analyze your past sales, stock, operations, and user data to report future risks and revenue opportunities.
Solutions.sol_19_desc: Tools that generate marketing texts, newsletters, and visuals suited for your company's product range and social media tone using AI.
Solutions.sol_20_desc: Language engines that analyze and make sense of thousands of comments, survey responses, or emails from your customers in seconds.
